name: German Sweet Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Melt chocolate in boiling water and let cool. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt together in a small bowl. Cream butter and sugar well in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract and melted chocolate mixture. Alternate adding the flour mixture with buttermilk, beating after each addition. Fold in egg whites until combined. Pour batter into three 9-inch layer pans lined on bottoms with parchment paper. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool in pans for 15 minutes before removing and transferring to a rack to cool completely. Spread coconut-pecan filling and frosting between layers and over the top of the cake.
